Exports

VkPhysicalDeviceExternalFenceInfoKHR, VK_IMAGE_COMPRESSION_FIXED_RATE_19BPC_BIT_EXT, VkDisplayModeParametersKHR, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_CLUSTER_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_PROPERTIES_NV, VkPhysicalDeviceVulkan13Features, VK_RENDERING_ATTACHMENT_RESOLVE_SKIP_TRANSFER_FUNCTION_BIT_KHR, VK_TOOL_PURPOSE_TRACING_BIT, VkConditionalRenderingFlagsEXT, VK_ACCESS_2_MICROMAP_WRITE_BIT_EXT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_H264_INLINE_SESSION_PARAMETERS_INFO_KHR, VK_FORMAT_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_422_UNORM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COPY_IMAGE_TO_IMAGE_INFO_EXT, VK_GEOMETRY_INSTANCE_TRIANGLE_FRONT_COUNTERCLOCKWISE_BIT_NV, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_VP9_PROFILE_INFO_KHR, VkPhysicalDeviceBufferDeviceAddressFeaturesKHR, VisualID, VK_PIPELINE_CREATE_2_RAY_TRACING_OPACITY_MICROMAP_BIT_EXT, VkExternalMemoryHandleTypeFlags, VK_DEVICE_QUEUE_CREATE_INTERNALLY_SYNCHRONIZED_BIT_KHR, VK_OPACITY_MICROMAP_SPECIAL_INDEX_FULLY_UNKNOWN_OPAQUE_EXT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_2_DATA_GRAPH_BIT_ARM, VkPhysicalDeviceCopyMemoryIndirectFeaturesNV, VK_FORMAT_R16G16B16_UINT, VkSurfaceCreateInfoOHOS, StdVideoEncodeAV1OperatingPointInfo, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_FLOAT_CONTROLS_PROPERTIES_KHR, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_INDIRECT_DEVICE_ADDRESS_INFO_NV, VK_PIPELINE_COLOR_BLEND_STATE_CREATE_RASTERIZATION_ORDER_ATTACHMENT_ACCESS_BIT_EXT, VkDataGraphPipelineBuiltinModelCreateInfoQCOM, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_2_VERTEX_INPUT_BIT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDER_PASS_CREATE_INFO_2_KHR, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_2_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDERING_INFO_KHR, VkMemoryMapInfo, VK_COMPONENT_TYPE_FLOAT_E5M2_NV,
